title: ServiceNow Falls After Reporting Sales Slowed by Mideast War
description: ServiceNow Inc. shares dropped in extended trading after the provider of software for business tasks reported results that disappointed investors and said some sales deals have been delayed by the war in the Middle East.

title: Texas Instruments Soars After Data Center Demand Buoys Sales
description: Texas Instruments Inc. shares surged in late trading after the chipmaker gave a surprisingly strong forecast, helped by booming spending on data centers and industrial equipment.

title: Core Scientific Raises $3.3 Billion From AI Junk-Bond Offering
description: Core Scientific Inc. sold $3.3 billion in a high-yield note sale, marking the latest risky borrowing tied to AI infrastructure construction.
